low.description: Microsoft-built connectors with no external data egress.

medium.description: Certified third-party connectors with limited external data movement.

high.description: Custom or uncertified integrations, cross-boundary data flows, or financial system access.

blocked.description: Connectors prohibited in regulated Copilot contexts.

dataFlowBoundaries.name: internal-m365
dataFlowBoundaries.description: Microsoft 365 services operating within approved tenant boundaries.

dataFlowBoundaries.name: certified-third-party
dataFlowBoundaries.description: Certified SaaS platforms approved for controlled business workflows.

dataFlowBoundaries.name: regulated-financial-systems
dataFlowBoundaries.description: Systems holding customer, trade, or supervisory records that require attestation.

dataFlowBoundaries.name: personal-or-public-services
dataFlowBoundaries.description: Personal storage or public social services that are not approved for regulated use.
